description: Device state facts retrieved from the Neo4j inventory layer — installed components, versions, configuration state, and device relationships.
Compatibility rules, version constraints, dependency constraints, and conflict constraints retrieved from the Qdrant compatibility_rules collection.
Domain knowledge definitions, component descriptions, and conceptual facts retrieved from the Qdrant domain_knowledge collection.
Explicit dependency relationships between components, derived from compatibility rules or domain knowledge.
Version constraint facts — minimum versions, exact versions, supported version ranges, and end-of-support thresholds.
Lifecycle state facts for components — active, deprecated, end-of-life, or end-of-support — from compatibility and domain layers.
Detected rule violations — cases where an installed component version fails a compatibility or minimum-version constraint.
Remediation actions and upgrade recommendations derived from compatibility rules and violation evidence.
Risk assessments for detected violations — severity classification and blast-radius estimation.
